text:
Migrated the app fully to the Next.js App Router and removed `pages/` entirely.

The main replacements are in place:
- `_app` and `_document` moved to [app/layout.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx:1), with global CSS imported there and the old app shell preserved.
- `getServerSideProps`, `getStaticProps`, and `getStaticPaths` were replaced with App Router patterns in [app/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx:1), [app/blog/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/page.tsx:1), and [app/blog/[id]/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx:1) using server components, `headers()`, `revalidate`, `generateStaticParams`, and `generateMetadata`.
- `next/head` became route `metadata`, `next/router` became `next/navigation` client components, and Pages API routes became route handlers in [app/api/posts/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/route.ts:1) and [app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts:1).
- `404.js` and `_error.js` became [app/not-found.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/not-found.tsx:1) and [app/error.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/error.tsx:1).

I also added types across the migrated code, converted the shared provider to [components/AppProvider.tsx](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.tsx:1), and centralized external post fetching in [lib/posts.ts](/home/user/workspace/lib/posts.ts:1).

Verification: `npm run build` passes. Next also updated [tsconfig.json](/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json:1) to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts`.
